projects.title: Resyntha
projects.shortDescription: Multi-Agent Research Intelligence Platform for automated literature review, multi-provider retrieval, structured knowledge extraction, research landscape generation, and research gap detection.

overview.problem: Researchers face information overload — manually reviewing hundreds of papers, extracting key findings, and identifying research gaps is slow and inconsistent.
overview.solution: Resyntha orchestrates multiple AI agents across a stage-based asynchronous pipeline to automate literature reviews: it searches academic sources via multi-provider retrieval, extracts structured knowledge, generates research landscapes, detects gaps, and provides an AI copilot for interactive exploration.

details.architecture: Production-oriented FastAPI backend with a stage-based pipeline engine driving asynchronous execution via ARQ and Redis. SQLAlchemy manages PostgreSQL persistence for versioned artifacts. React + TypeScript frontend with TanStack Query orchestrates real-time pipeline state. Multi-provider retrieval supports Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, and arXiv. Groq accelerates LLM inference for extraction and analysis stages.
technicalChallenges: Designing a stage-based pipeline engine with deterministic validation between stages
Managing asynchronous task execution with Redis queue and result backpressure
Building versioned artifact storage with rollback and diff capabilities
Orchestrating multi-agent coordination without deadlock or duplicated work
Implementing caching strategies across API sources to respect rate limits
Supporting multi-provider retrieval with normalized result formats
details.learnings: Deepened understanding of pipeline architecture design, asynchronous task orchestration, multi-agent coordination patterns, building observability into distributed data workflows, and production-oriented backend architecture.

futureImprovements: Interactive research landscape visualization with graph exploration
Custom agent creation interface for domain-specific extraction
Collaborative review sessions with shared workspaces
Automated literature alerting and monitoring for new publications
Expanded source adapters for PubMed, IEEE, and Scopus

projects.title: Atlas
projects.shortDescription: Production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform with OCR pipeline, pgvector semantic search, streaming citation-aware generation, and modular backend.

overview.problem: Traditional search and Q&A systems lack document-grounded, citation-aware responses. Users need answers that are verifiable against source material, not black-box LLM outputs.
overview.solution: Atlas ingests documents through an OCR pipeline, generates vector embeddings, stores them in pgvector for semantic search, and serves citation-grounded answers with streaming responses. A modular backend separates ingestion, retrieval, generation, and authentication layers.

details.architecture: Modular FastAPI backend with distinct ingestion, retrieval, generation, and auth services. OCR pipeline normalizes scanned documents before vector embedding. pgvector enables efficient hybrid search combining dense and sparse retrieval for optimal relevance. Better Auth handles session and API key management. Streaming responses deliver citation-aware AI outputs in real time. React frontend provides the user interface.
technicalChallenges: Designing a modular architecture where ingestion, retrieval, and generation can scale independently
Building an OCR pipeline that normalizes diverse document formats into clean text
Implementing hybrid search (dense + sparse) over pgvector for optimal relevance
Streaming citation-grounded responses without breaking the document context window
Managing authentication across modular services without coupling
details.learnings: Explored RAG architecture patterns, embedding strategies for domain-specific retrieval, streaming response design, and modular backend decomposition for AI systems.

futureImprovements: Multi-modal retrieval supporting images and tables
Document analytics dashboard with usage insights
Custom embedding fine-tuning for domain corpora
Collaborative document collections with shared access control
Real-time document update and re-indexing pipeline

projects.title: Engineering Portfolio
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack engineering portfolio featuring an Engineering Handbook with GitHub-synced notes, an AI assistant with portfolio context, LeetCode telemetry, and a dynamic Markdown content system.

overview.problem: Traditional portfolios are static and don't reflect engineering depth or system thinking.
overview.solution: Built a dynamic, JSON/Markdown-driven portfolio with a terminal-inspired UI, an AI assistant that understands project and note context, a GitHub-synced Engineering Handbook, LeetCode telemetry dashboard, and responsive design.

details.architecture: React + Vite frontend with responsive UI, Express backend providing AI and content APIs. Content is driven by JSON and Markdown files. Features include an Engineering Handbook with GitHub integration for markdown notes, an AI Assistant with portfolio-aware context, a LeetCode Telemetry dashboard, and a dynamic Markdown rendering system.
technicalChallenges: Designing a reusable content pipeline for JSON and Markdown
Rendering engineering notes safely with syntax highlighting
Integrating a lightweight AI assistant without overengineering
Building real-time LeetCode telemetry with caching
Implementing GitHub-synced markdown content delivery
details.learnings: Improved content architecture, markdown rendering, clean backend integration for AI-assisted interactions, and real-time data fetching patterns.

futureImprovements: Polish AI assistant prompts and context builder
Add more engineering notes and code examples

projects.title: SUMS - Smart University Management System
projects.shortDescription: Role-based university management system focusing on academic workflows and placement processes.

overview.problem: University administrative workflows were fragmented and required role-based access control and transactional integrity.
overview.solution: Designed normalized PostgreSQL schemas and role-based APIs to support Students, Faculty, and Admin workflows reliably.

details.architecture: Express.js backend, PostgreSQL with normalized schemas, clear role-based routing and validation middleware.
technicalChallenges: Designing a BCNF-like normalized schema that supports role-based workflows
Implementing transactional operations and validation across modules
details.learnings: Database normalization practices, API design for role-based systems, and validation pipelines.

futureImprovements: Add automated test coverage for core workflows

projects.title: GitHub Project Analyzer
projects.shortDescription: GitHub analytics dashboard that aggregates repository metadata using the GitHub REST API and visualizes language usage, repository popularity, and project statistics.

overview.problem: Developers often need a quick overview of GitHub repositories without manually inspecting every repository.
overview.solution: Built an analytics dashboard using Express.js that consumes GitHub REST APIs, aggregates repository data, and visualizes developer statistics using Chart.js.

details.architecture: Express backend consuming GitHub REST APIs, EJS-templated views, Chart.js for data visualization.
technicalChallenges: Handling GitHub API rate limits with pagination and caching
Designing clean visualizations for small datasets
details.learnings: API integration patterns, rate limit handling strategies, and data visualization basics.
